text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where the
Umamusume train to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's a pleasant wind today, especially for the
height of summer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's as good a start as any, I think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Last year, Symboli Rudolf spent all her time at
summer camp taking care of the other students,
but this year...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's my intention. Naturally, I still have student
council affairs waiting in the wings...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But I thought it might be nice to experience the
excitement of the first day of summer camp for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Just like any other student of Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's about time for roll call. Let's get started,
shall we?
